summary: Verified 3 bug fixes: (1) Rankings 4th+ place points now WHITE, top 3 have podium colors, (2) Weekly standings matchday dropdown shows ALL 25 matchdays (1-25) for National League, (3) Tournament TREND section shows only completed matchups with correct marginTop spacing
critical_code_review_comments: FIX 1 VERIFIED: rankings.tsx line 1010 - pointsText color is now #FFFFFF for non-top3, top 3 uses podiumColor
FIX 2 VERIFIED: standings.py lines 184-189 - National league now returns all matchdays from current season regardless of predictions
FIX 3 VERIFIED: TournamentView.tsx line 411 - last5 uses completed.slice(-5) to filter to completed matchups only
FIX 3 VERIFIED: TournamentView.tsx line 456 - marginTop: 16 separates TREND from PERFORMANCE section

test_credentials.standard_user: ilio@raimondi.it / password123 (for rankings test with Lega Nazionale)
test_credentials.admin_user: admin@fantapronostic.com / admin123 (for tournament TREND test with Torneo Redubull)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified: (1) Rankings points color now white for 4th+ place, orange/gold for top 3 only. (2) National league matchday dropdown shows all 25 matchdays. (3) Tournament TREND shows only completed matchups with proper spacing. NOTE: Had to restart expo server to clear cache for FIX 3 to show correctly in browser.

fix_1_rankings_points_color.details: Positions 1-3 (admin=45, test_patch_35908d=39, desy=18) have orange/gold/silver/bronze podium colors. Positions 4+ (joiner_1771426142, joinuser367daec6, etc with 0 pts) have WHITE points text (#FFFFFF)

fix_2_matchdays_dropdown.details: Weekly standings dropdown shows Giornata 1 through Giornata 25 when scrolled
fix_2_matchdays_dropdown.evidence: matchday_dropdown_bottom.png screenshot showing Giornata 1 at bottom

fix_3_trend_completed_only.details: TREND shows 1 bar with value=2 at round 1 (from completed matchup), not 5 bars from pending matchups

fix_3_trend_margintop.details: TREND section has marginTop: 16 separating it from PERFORMANCE section

notes.caching_issue: Initially TREND showed stale data (5 bars from pending matchups). Fixed by restarting expo server to clear metro cache. Browser may have been serving cached bundle.
